hooks.command:
if echo "$CC_BASH_COMMAND" | grep -q 'gh pr create'; then echo '
⚠️  MANDATORY: Run `scaffold run review-pr` to execute the 3-channel review.

Auth recovery if needed: `! codex login` (Codex) / `! gemini -p "hello"` (Gemini)
Always run CLI commands in foreground — never use run_in_background.
Fix all P0/P1/P2 findings before moving on. Do NOT skip any channel.'; fi
